title: GOOD: BroadcastError variants encode retry semantics
description: The BroadcastError enum distinguishes Grpc (transport failure, transient, retry may help) from BroadcastFailed (node rejection, permanent, retry will not help without fixing the tx). Callers can match on the variant to implement correct retry policy without string-matching on error messages. The doc comment on the enum and on broadcast_tx() both explain this distinction explicitly, so future callers understand the intent without reading the lightwalletd service.proto.
